items.title: June 12, 1988: With under 7:00 left in Game 3 of the NBA Finals, Magic Johnson's mother already has the Lakers' postgame meal prepared and waiting in the locker room.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 12, 1988: With under 7:00 left in Game 3 of the NBA Finals, Magic Johnson's mother already has the Lakers' postgame meal prepared and waiting in the locker room.

Christine Johnson's menu: Fried chicken, potato salad, tossed salad, pasta salad, homemade rolls, cake and sweet potato pie.

items.title: June 12, 1998: Karl Malone finishes with 39 PTS (17-27 FG)/9 REB/5 AST during Utah's 83-81 victory at Chicago in Game 5 of the NBA Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 12, 1998: Karl Malone finishes with 39 PTS (17-27 FG)/9 REB/5 AST during Utah's 83-81 victory at Chicago in Game 5 of the NBA Finals.

Antoine Carr added 12 PTS off the bench for the Jazz, who cut the Bulls' series lead to 3-2. Chicago's Toni Kukoč scored 30 PTS (11-13 FG).
